nodes.name: Daily 9:55 PM EST
nodes.notes: Fires daily at 9:55 PM EST, 5 min before research pipeline

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: $json.model, max_tokens: 5, system: [{ type: 'text', text: $json.system_prompt, cache_control: { type: 'ephemeral' } }], messages: [{ role: 'user', content: 'Warm cache. Respond with OK.' }] }) }}

meta.description: Daily cache warmer at 9:55 PM EST (5 min before research pipeline). For each of 7 Minds: sends Claude API call with full system prompt, max_tokens: 5, cache_control: ephemeral. Logs results with cache hit/miss stats.
